title: Jira Blocked Status Aging Beyond Policy Threshold
dataSources: Jira issues with status transition timestamps
app: Splunk Add-on for Jira Cloud (6211) or Jira Tracking Add-on (5547)
spl:
index=itsm sourcetype="jira:cloud:issues" OR sourcetype="jira:issue"
| where status_category="Blocked" OR status="Blocked"
| eval age_h=(now()-status_entered_epoch)/3600
| where age_h > 48
| table key, project, summary, assignee, age_h
| sort -age_h
description: Long-lived blocked work hides dependency risk and skews sprint metrics.
value: Surfaces tickets needing escalation before SLA breach.
implementation: Populate `status_entered_epoch` from changelog polling or webhook augment.

references.title: Source types — Splunk Add-on for Jira Cloud

knownFalsePositives: Long blocked work while waiting on another team, a vendor, or a future release; not every old blocked row is a policy breach.
grandmaExplanation: We watch items that sit blocked too long, so a dependency, vendor, or handoff is not an invisible year-long wait.
detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
• Install and configure: Splunk Add-on for Jira Cloud (6211) or Jira Tracking Add-on (5547).
• Data: Jira issues with status transition timestamps.
• For directory layout and inputs, see docs/implementation-guide.md.

Step 1 — Configure data collection
Populate `status_entered_epoch` from changelog polling or webhook augment.

Step 2 — Create the search and alert
Run the following search (then save as report or alert; tune time range and threshold):

```spl
index=itsm sourcetype="jira:cloud:issues" OR sourcetype="jira:issue"
| where status_category="Blocked" OR status="Blocked"
| eval age_h=(now()-status_entered_epoch)/3600
| where age_h > 48
| table key, project, summary, assignee, age_h
| sort -age_h
```

Understanding this search
Long-lived blocked work hides dependency risk and skews sprint metrics.

Step 3 — Validate
Compare with the Jira issue page, board, or service project view for the same dates. Confirm issue keys, status, and assignment fields; reconcile timestamp fields you use in the report.

Step 4 — Operationalize
Add to a dashboard, wire alert actions, and document ownership. Suggested view: Column chart (age buckets), Table (top issues).
